## Description / 描述

<!-- Please describe the changes in this PR.
     请描述此 PR 中的更改。 -->

## Type of Change / 更改类型

- [ ] Documentation fix / 文档修正 (typo, broken link, formatting)
- [ ] Translation fix / 翻译修正
- [ ] New translation / 新增翻译
- [ ] Asset update / 资源更新 (screenshots, images)
- [ ] Other / 其他

## Related Issue / 关联 Issue

<!-- Link any related issues here with "Closes #xxx" or "Fixes #xxx".
     使用 "Closes #xxx" 或 "Fixes #xxx" 关联相关 Issue。 -->

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes are limited to the described scope / 更改仅限于所描述的范围
- [ ] Spelling and grammar have been checked / 已检查拼写和语法
- [ ] Links in the changed files work correctly / 更改文件中的链接均可正常访问
- [ ] If translating, the meaning matches the English source / 若为翻译，含义与英文原文一致

## Screenshots / 截图

     如果更改影响视觉呈现，请附上截图。 -->
